description_long: This is a classic baseball cap with a structured, rounded crown and a slightly curved brim. The cap is predominantly white, featuring a red circular logo patch with a stylized white 'Z' on the front panel. The back of the cap has an open section, typical of adjustable baseball caps, likely for a strap or snap closure. The surface appears to be made of a smooth, woven fabric, likely cotton or a cotton blend, with visible panel seams. The cap is lightweight and designed to fit snugly on the head, providing shade and casual style. Its minimalist design is accented only by the prominent front logo.
description: A white baseball cap with a red circular logo patch featuring a stylized 'Z' on the front, and an open adjustable back. The cap has a smooth, structured crown and a slightly curved brim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red circular logo patch with a white 'Z' on the center front panel and the curved brim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the smooth, rounded crown and the length of the brim, with the logo patch partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open adjustable section at the back of the crown, typical of baseball caps.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the continuous smooth crown and brim, with the logo patch just visible at the front edge.
